name: Catan
info: Trade, build, and settle the island of Catan.

name: Monopoly
info: Buy properties and bankrupt your friends.

name: Activity
info: Guess words through drawing, acting, and describing.

name: Dungeons & Dragons
info: A cooperative fantasy role-playing adventure game.

name: Secret Hitler
info: A social deduction game of deception and hidden roles.

name: Poker
info: A classic card game of strategy, betting, and bluffing.

name: Codenames
info: A word association game where teams guess secret agents.

name: Ticket to Ride
info: Build train routes across countries and complete destination tickets.

name: UNO
info: Match colors and numbers and be the first to get rid of your cards.

name: Exploding Kittens
info: A chaotic card game of luck, strategy, and exploding cats.

name: Risk
info: A global domination strategy board game.

name: Carcassonne
info: Build landscapes and claim cities, roads, and fields.

name: Pandemic
info: Cooperative game where players work together to stop global disease outbreaks.

name: Splendor
info: Collect gems and build a Renaissance trading empire.

name: Azul
info: A tile-placement game about creating beautiful mosaic patterns.

name: The Resistance
info: A social deduction game of trust, betrayal, and hidden spies.
